compiled_state.title: UPDATE: document CI check-usage.sh exemption in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Add a documentation note to plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md explaining that check-usage.sh (Claude OAuth usage throttle) is not invoked in the CI llm-review runner.

Specifically, under the section covering orchestration.max_agents or the CI runner configuration (add a new subsection if none exists), add a note:

'CI context exemption: ci-llm-review-runner.sh does not invoke check-usage.sh. The usage throttle requires an active Claude Code OAuth session and is not available in headless CI environments. Rate-limit backoff for CI deep-tier parallel curl calls is handled via curl --retry / --retry-delay flags on each request instead.'

Done criteria: the note appears in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md in a logical location; no existing content is removed or altered; bash -n passes on any shell scripts touched (none expected).
